_comment: Odoo 16 differentiation from odoo-17 base: Python 3.10 baseline, OWL 2.x rewrite mainstream, account.move refactor (account.invoice → account.move unification completed), @api.multi removed. Reuses odoo-17 rule pack as it's closer to modern era than legacy odoo-12. TODO: add templates/cursor/rules/odoo-16/ when v16-specific .mdc content is authored.
description: Odoo 16 Community / Enterprise — Python 3.10+, OWL 2.x rewrite mainstream, @api.multi REMOVED, account.move refactor. Modern era; reuses odoo-17 rule pack.

stack._doc: Per-stack optional path overrides — used by realdata_test MCP. Leave empty to let user set <PREFIX>_ODOO_BIN / <PREFIX>_ODOO_CONF env vars at runtime.

_rules_comment: TODO: differentiate from odoo-17 base when templates/cursor/rules/odoo-16/ is authored. v16 is the first major OWL2 release — patterns very close to v17.
